system.description:
Discipline: Waijia
Skill: Any Combat Skill against foe’s Parry or Evade
Type: Normal
Qi: 1

You use your hands, feet or weapon to guide the body of another person, forcing them to deliver attacks as you intend. On a success you force the target to serve as an intermediary for your attacks. You direct them, and they attack using weapons and abilities they possess. The person attacks on your turn, but does not lose their regular turn as a result. Cathartic: You can channel your Kung Fu Techniques through the target. Princess Sarnai strikes at Princess Samga with Knock of the Meteor Hammer.
system.source: Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate, Chapter 3: Kung Fu Techniques
system.activationSkill: Any Combat Skill against foe’s Parry or Evade
system.catharticEffect: You can channel your Kung Fu Techniques through the target. Princess Sarnai strikes at Princess Samga with Knock of the Meteor Hammer.
